name: Lema AI
oneliner: Agentic security platform that continuously maps and evaluates third-party vendor risk using autonomous agents — replacing static questionnaire-based compliance with real-time attack path analysis.
finserv: Financial services and healthcare Fortune 500 customers. Addresses third-party vendor risk under OCC guidance and DORA. Led by Team8 with Salesforce Ventures.
team: Founded 2023 by Eddie Dovzhik, Omer Yehudai, Tomer Roizman. $24M Series A led by Team8, Salesforce Ventures. Seed by F2 Venture Capital.
thesis: Third-party vendor risk is one of the highest-friction compliance burdens in financial services. Lema's agentic approach maps directly onto what regulators now expect under DORA and OCC guidance — a potential partner for AI-vendor risk posture.
evidence: Lema AI Emerges From Stealth With $24M
